description:
The quiz assesses advanced JavaScript error‑handling knowledge, focusing on nuanced issues like serialization pitfalls and cross‑context instanceof failures. It is positioned as a challenging, senior‑level test with a playful, encouraging tone. The difficulty is high, targeting developers who want to benchmark and sharpen their debugging expertise.
Topics: JavaScript error handling, Serialization errors, Cross‑context instanceof behavior, Advanced debugging techniques, Common pitfalls in try‑catch usage
Audience: Experienced JavaScript developers, senior front‑end engineers, and technical interview candidates seeking to deepen their error‑handling skills.
